requirement_topic.en: Kyrgyzstan Market Access — EAEU EAC, Kyrgyzstandart, and Nascent EV Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦市场准入——EAEU EAC、Kyrgyzstandart及早期电动车部署
requirement_topic.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦市場准入——EAEU EAC、Kyrgyzstandart及早期電動車部署

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan is a full EAEU member state, so EAEU technical regulations and EAC marking apply to in-scope products placed on its market. For EV chargers, the likely core route is TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage safety plus TR CU 020/2011 for EMC, with exact conformity form, applicant responsibility, model-family coverage, lab evidence, language, and marking determined by product scope. Kyrgyzstandart is the national standards body and may adopt or reference GOST / IEC standards; project owners, grid operators, or lenders may require IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000, OCPP, or local documentation even where EAEU conformity is handled separately. The Kyrgyzstan EV charger market remains nascent, so deployment is often project-led and shaped by fleet composition, public procurement, importer capability, service support, cold climate, and high-altitude operating conditions.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU正式成员国，因此EAEU技术法规和EAC标志适用于投放其市场的范围内产品。对电动汽车充电桩而言，可能的核心路径是TR CU 004/2011低压安全加TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容，具体合格评定形式、申请人责任、型号系列覆盖、实验室证据、语言和标志取决于产品范围。Kyrgyzstandart是国家标准机构，可能采纳或引用GOST / IEC标准；项目业主、电网运营商或融资方即使在EAEU合格评定单独处理时，也可能要求IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、OCPP或本地文件。吉尔吉斯斯坦电动汽车充电桩市场仍处于早期，因此部署通常由项目驱动，并受车队构成、公共采购、进口商能力、服务支持、寒冷气候和高海拔运行条件影响。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU正式成員國，因此EAEU技術法規和EAC標誌適用於投放其市場的範圍內產品。對電動汽車充電樁而言，可能的核心路徑是TR CU 004/2011低壓安全加TR CU 020/2011電磁相容，具體合格評定形式、申請人責任、型號系列覆蓋、實驗室證據、語言和標誌取決於產品範圍。Kyrgyzstandart是國家標準機構，可能採納或引用GOST / IEC標準；項目業主、電網運營商或融資方即使在EAEU合格評定單獨處理時，也可能要求IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、OCPP或本地文件。吉爾吉斯斯坦電動汽車充電樁市場仍處於早期，因此部署通常由項目驅動，並受車隊構成、公共採購、進口商能力、服務支持、寒冷氣候和高海拔運行條件影響。

standards_or_laws: Treaty on the Eurasian Economic Union and Kyrgyz Republic accession to the EAEU
TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking rules
Kyrgyzstandart national standards system; GOST / IEC adoption where applicable
NEHC / grid-operator and project-owner technical requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented with GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234.1 / .2 / .3 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication evidence, China domestic factory tests, and CCC / CQC or customer-specific certificates where applicable. These materials can support an EAEU technical file or project review but do not establish EAC marking, Kyrgyzstandart acceptance, NEHC coordination, or connector compatibility for Kyrgyzstan.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234.1 / .2 / .3接口标准、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信证据、中国国内工厂测试，以及适用时的CCC / CQC或客户特定证书准备文件。这些资料可支持EAEU技术文件或项目审查，但不能证明已取得吉尔吉斯斯坦所需的EAC标志、Kyrgyzstandart接受、NEHC协调或接口兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234.1 / .2 / .3接口標準、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊證據、中國國內工廠測試，以及適用時的CCC / CQC或客戶特定證書準備文件。這些資料可支持EAEU技術文件或項目審查，但不能證明已取得吉爾吉斯斯坦所需的EAC標誌、Kyrgyzstandart接受、NEHC協調或接口相容性。

standards_or_laws: China CCC / CQC or customer-specific charger evidence where applicable

gap.en: Before shipment or bidding, map the importer, HS code, rated voltage, AC / DC charger type, radio and payment functions, connector set, EAEU applicant role, EAC declaration or certification route, Kyrgyz / Russian documentation, IEC evidence, spare parts, winter service plan, and grid-operator approval path. Do not treat China GB/T or CCC evidence as automatic market access, and do not treat Kyrgyzstan's early EV market as a waiver of EAEU technical regulation.
gap.zh: 出货或投标前，应映射进口商、HS编码、额定电压、交流/直流充电桩类型、无线和支付功能、接口组合、EAEU申请人角色、EAC声明或认证路径、吉尔吉斯文/俄文文件、IEC证据、备件、冬季服务计划和电网运营商批准路径。不要将中国GB/T或CCC证据视为自动市场准入，也不要将吉尔吉斯斯坦早期电动车市场视为EAEU技术法规豁免。
gap.zht: 出貨或投標前，應映射進口商、HS編碼、額定電壓、交流/直流充電樁類型、無線和支付功能、接口組合、EAEU申請人角色、EAC聲明或認證路徑、吉爾吉斯文/俄文文件、IEC證據、備件、冬季服務計劃和電網運營商批准路徑。不要將中國GB/T或CCC證據視為自動市場准入，也不要將吉爾吉斯斯坦早期電動車市場視為EAEU技術法規豁免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger falls within EAEU TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, or other EAEU technical-regulation scope; Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC, NEHC, procurement, public-network, or lender requirements may add project-specific mandatory gates
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T / CCC / CQC evidence applies under China-side rules and is supporting evidence only for Kyrgyzstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kyrgyzstan is not a non-EAEU exception: for in-scope EV chargers, EAEU TR CU / EAC is a real market-access pathway. Chinese exporters should pair that route with Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC checks, NEHC project coordination, connector selection, and cold-climate / altitude evidence before claiming Kyrgyzstan readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉尔吉斯斯坦不是非EAEU例外：对范围内电动汽车充电桩，EAEU TR CU / EAC是真实市场准入路径。中国出口商在宣称面向吉尔吉斯斯坦前，应同时处理Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC核查、NEHC项目协调、接口选择以及寒冷气候/海拔证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉爾吉斯斯坦不是非EAEU例外：對範圍內電動汽車充電樁，EAEU TR CU / EAC是真實市場准入路徑。中國出口商在宣稱面向吉爾吉斯斯坦前，應同時處理Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC核查、NEHC項目協調、接口選擇以及寒冷氣候/海拔證據。
